stdout:
**Acceptance Criteria**

No blocking findings.

REQ-01 is met by the single acceptance test at [cross_substrate_generality_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/cross_substrate_generality_tests.rs:164). It covers all four kinds through `jit item list`, `jit item show`, and `jit item search` at lines 197, 257, 320, and 409.

REQ-02 is adequately asserted: the same unfiltered `jit item list` includes issue-scoped markdown items and the project-scoped `@/INV-01` registry item at lines 205-224, and all four resolve through `jit item show` at lines 320-401. The exercised production path uses `list_items`, `search_items`, `show_item` in [commands/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs:84), with project and issue substrates feeding shared item indexing/projection at [domain/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs:1112).

REQ-03 is met by the recorded passed `cargo-ci` gate for commit `9dade2bb`: `fmt ok`, `clippy ok`, `2499 passed, 0 failed`.

**Architecture**

No boundary violations found. The added commit is test-only. The production path it exercises keeps CLI parsing in [cli.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/cli.rs:322), rendering/dispatch in [main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/main.rs:418), orchestration in [commands/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs:84), and pure projection in [domain/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs:1150).

**Functional Paradigm**

No blocking issue. The touched test uses straightforward CLI setup; production item search/list paths use iterator combinators for filtering and projection at [commands/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs:87) and [commands/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs:143).

**Correctness And Invariants**

No blocking issue. The new test does not add production writes or state transitions. Event logging, gate semantics, assignee/label formats, and PID safety are not affected. Project-scope registry-first routing is explicit at [commands/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs:192), and unknown registry-first project kinds are rejected rather than silently borrowing invariant data at lines 201-207.

**Safety**

No unsafe code introduced. Workspace crates enforce `#![deny(unsafe_code)]` in [crates/jit/src/lib.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/lib.rs:6), [crates/jit/src/main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/main.rs:14), and server crate roots.

**Testing**

No blocking issue. The new test is an integration-style CLI test with `CARGO_BIN_EXE_jit`, named `test_all_four_kinds_through_one_generic_path` at [cross_substrate_generality_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/cross_substrate_generality_tests.rs:164). The issue has a succeeded `cargo-ci` gate, so I did not rerun cargo tests. I did run `./scripts/jit-validate.sh`; it passed.

**Error Handling**

No new library `unwrap()`/`expect()` usage was introduced. The added unwraps are test-only. Production errors on item resolution include contextual messages, for example invalid qualified id at [commands/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs:264), unresolved project self-id at line 276, and issue-scope resolution context at line 290.

**CLI Contract**

No blocking issue. `jit item list`, `show`, `resolve`, and `search` all expose `--json` in [cli.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/cli.rs:334), [cli.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/cli.rs:352), [cli.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/cli.rs:365), and [cli.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/cli.rs:385). JSON error handling is preserved in [main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/main.rs:428).

**Documentation**

No new public API was added by this commit. Existing public item APIs include doc comments with examples, including `list_items` at [commands/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs:73), `search_items` at line 129, `show_item` at line 252, and `index_project_sources` at [domain/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs:1129).

**Jit Issue Management**

Dependencies are complete: `205472c4` and `69bd8cd5` are both `done` with passed `cargo-ci` and `code-review` gates. `./scripts/jit-validate.sh` passed. No prior run feedback was supplied in `run_history`.

VERDICT: PASS
